statusLine.command: echo "🌿 $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-git') | 🤖 sonnet[1m] | 🔀 $(git status -s 2>/dev/null | wc -l) changes | 📝 $(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null | head -c 30)... | 🌐 $(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}') | 📡 $(netstat -an 2>/dev/null | grep ESTABLISHED | wc -l) conn | 🔢 $(ps aux | wc -l) proc | 🐳 $(docker ps -q 2>/dev/null | wc -l) docker | 📁 $(basename $(pwd))"
